preguntas.pregunta: [1/20] Now the new Phantom XR7 is faster than a Zippy but ___ expensive.
[2/20] I speak good English, but my sister's English is much ___ .
[3/20] South Africa is ___ than Iceland.
[4/20] Which is the ___ animal on land? The cheetah, of course.
[5/20] Snakes are the ___ dangerous animals in my country.
[6/20] Waiters ___ wash their hands before they start work. It's a strict rule.
[7/20] You ___ wear a uniform in this office. Black trousers and a white shirt are fine.
[8/20] You ___ be late for work! The boss gets very angry.
[9/20] You work too hard and look tired. You ___ go on holiday.
[10/20] Those trousers are awful. You ___ buy them.
[11/20] Don't worry about your exam. I'm sure you ___ get a better mark.
[12/20] In the future, do you think pills ___ replace food entirely?
[13/20] A man ___ down the street when he suddenly saw a piece of paper on the floor.
[14/20] It was a beautiful day. The sun ___ and the birds were singing.
[15/20] What ___ at 2 a.m. this morning? The music was really loud!
[16/20] As I arrived at the station, the last passengers ___ on the train.
[17/20] ___ you ever been to Paris? Yes, I went last year with Maddy.
[18/20] This is the first time I ___ a live concert. It's so exciting!
[19/20] I ___ skied before in my life. This is terrifying!
[20/20] Have you tried the new Korean restaurant? Yes, we ___ there last weekend.
